### Meet the Cat

Cats are small, carnivorous mammals that have lived alongside humans for thousands of years. Known for their agility, curiosity, and independent spirit
, they make affectionate and entertaining companions. While they often sleep up to 16 hours a day, they are also skilled hunters and playful explorers. From sleek shorth
airs to fluffy longhairs, cats come in a beautiful array of breeds, colors, and personalities.
